title: aloe × rigida var. expansa
intro: Aloe × rigida var. expansa, also known as the Aloe rigida or the Golden Aloe, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the Aloe genus and is native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, that can help soothe and heal burns, wounds, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Aloe × rigida var. expansa include promoting skin health, reducing inflammation, and providing relief from digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. Aloe × rigida var. expansa can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as gels, ointments, and teas, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
